response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and DLang developer but fundamentally lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ Windows development required for this position. Furthermore, the candidate does not possess the necessary Capital Markets or Fixed Income domain expertise, nor the enterprise database experience (SQL Server/Oracle) mandated by the job description.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience (15+ years) across diverse tech stacks.
Strong background in CI/CD pipelines, DevOps, and test-driven development (TDD).
Has foundational exposure to the financial/investment sector through previous work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience, with only ~7 months recorded in 2014-2015.
Missing essential Windows platform C++ expertise, leaning heavily towards Linux and web technologies.
No demonstrated experience in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domains.
